all.en: Subject: A Friendly Reminder About Lunchroom Etiquette
all.zh: 主旨：員工餐廳禮儀的友善提醒

all.en: Dear team,
all.zh: 親愛的團隊，

all.en: Our shared lunchroom is one of our most popular spaces.
all.zh: 員工餐廳是公司最熱門的共享空間之一。

all.en: Hundreds of staff members use it every single day.
all.zh: 每日有數百位員工使用此空間。

all.en: To keep it pleasant for everyone, we ask for your cooperation.
all.zh: 為維持愉快的用餐環境，需要您的協助配合。

all.en: Recently, we have received several feedback notes about hygiene.
all.zh: 近期我們收到多則關於環境衛生的回饋。

all.en: This message gently outlines our updated etiquette guidelines.
all.zh: 本信溫和地說明更新後的禮儀守則。

all.en: First, please wipe down tables after every meal.
all.zh: 首先，每次用餐後請擦拭桌面。

all.en: Disinfecting wipes are available near the entrance.
all.zh: 消毒擦巾置於入口附近。

all.en: Crumbs and spills attract pests if left unattended.
all.zh: 未清理的食物殘渣與灑漏會吸引害蟲。

all.en: Even a quick wipe makes a big difference for the next person.
all.zh: 簡單擦拭即可為下一位使用者帶來大大改善。

all.en: Please dispose of food waste in the labeled compost bin.
all.zh: 請將廚餘倒入標示的堆肥桶。

all.en: Plastic packaging belongs in the recycling container instead.
all.zh: 塑膠包裝請改丟回收桶。

all.en: When in doubt, signs above each bin can guide your choice.
all.zh: 若不確定可參考各桶上方的指引。

all.en: Reducing landfill waste is a shared company goal.
all.zh: 減少掩埋垃圾是公司共同目標。

all.en: The microwave should be cleaned after each use as well.
all.zh: 微波爐使用後也請順手清潔。

all.en: Splatter inside the microwave is the top reported complaint.
all.zh: 微波爐內噴濺殘渣為最常見的投訴。

all.en: Please cover your food before heating to prevent mess.
all.zh: 加熱前請將食物加蓋以避免髒污。

all.en: If you spill, simply wipe with paper towels and disinfectant.
all.zh: 若有灑漏，請以紙巾與消毒劑擦拭。

all.en: The refrigerator is cleared every Friday afternoon.
all.zh: 冰箱於每週五下午統一清空。

all.en: Please label your food clearly with name and date.
all.zh: 請於食物上清楚標示姓名與日期。

all.en: Unlabeled or expired items will be thrown out without warning.
all.zh: 未標示或過期食物將不另通知直接丟棄。

all.en: Please respect personal belongings of other employees.
all.zh: 請尊重其他同仁的個人物品。

all.en: Borrowing someone's lunch is not acceptable, even by accident.
all.zh: 即使是無意，也請勿取用他人午餐。

all.en: Shared utensils should be returned to the drying rack clean.
all.zh: 共用餐具請洗淨後放回瀝水架。

all.en: Please do not leave dirty dishes in the sink overnight.
all.zh: 請勿將髒碗盤留置水槽過夜。

all.en: Cleaning staff handle deep cleans, not personal washing.
all.zh: 清潔人員負責深度清潔，不代洗個人餐具。

all.en: If the dishwasher is full, please run a cycle yourself.
all.zh: 如洗碗機已滿，請主動啟動清洗。

all.en: Operating instructions are posted above the appliance.
all.zh: 操作說明張貼於機器上方。

all.en: Keep food smells in mind when reheating certain items.
all.zh: 加熱特定食物時請留意氣味。

all.en: Strong odors like fish or curry can linger for hours.
all.zh: 魚類或咖哩等強烈氣味可能殘留數小時。

all.en: Consider eating these items in well-ventilated areas.
all.zh: 建議於通風良好的區域享用此類食物。

all.en: Please be mindful of noise during meal times.
all.zh: 用餐時請留意音量。

all.en: Quiet conversations help others relax during their break.
all.zh: 輕聲交談能讓他人於休息時放鬆。

all.en: Headphones are recommended when watching videos at the table.
all.zh: 於餐桌觀看影片時建議使用耳機。

all.en: Phone calls should be taken outside the lunchroom if possible.
all.zh: 如可能，請至餐廳外接聽電話。

all.en: Coffee and tea facilities are available for everyone.
all.zh: 咖啡與茶具供全員自由使用。

all.en: Please rinse cups immediately after use.
all.zh: 請於使用後立即清洗杯具。

all.en: Sugar and creamer containers should be sealed tightly.
all.zh: 糖罐與奶精罐請確實密封。

all.en: Spilled liquid in the cabinets attracts ants quickly.
all.zh: 櫃內灑出的液體會迅速吸引螞蟻。

all.en: If supplies run low, please notify the General Affairs office.
all.zh: 如備品不足，請通知總務辦公室。

all.en: Our team restocks the lunchroom three times per week.
all.zh: 我們團隊每週補貨三次。

all.en: Tables and chairs should be returned to their original positions.
all.zh: 桌椅請歸位至原本位置。

all.en: This makes cleaning easier and keeps the layout consistent.
all.zh: 此舉有助於清潔並保持空間配置一致。

all.en: Children visiting parents should be supervised at all times.
all.zh: 到訪的孩童需全程由家長照看。

all.en: We love welcoming families but safety remains the priority.
all.zh: 我們歡迎家庭來訪，但安全為首要考量。

all.en: Special events held in the lunchroom require prior approval.
all.zh: 於餐廳舉辦特別活動需事先核准。

all.en: Please contact General Affairs at least one week ahead.
all.zh: 請至少於一週前聯絡總務部。

all.en: Together, we can make the lunchroom enjoyable for all.
all.zh: 我們可一同打造人人喜愛的餐廳環境。

all.en: Small actions add up to a much better shared experience.
all.zh: 小小舉動能累積成大幅改善的共享體驗。

all.en: Thank you for taking these reminders to heart.
all.zh: 感謝您將這些提醒銘記於心。

all.en: Your cooperation truly makes a difference each day.
all.zh: 您的配合每天都帶來實質改變。

all.en: Please reach out with any further suggestions or concerns.
all.zh: 如有任何建議或疑慮，歡迎來信告知。

all.en: Kind regards,
all.zh: 致上誠摯敬意，

all.en: General Affairs Manager
all.zh: 總務經理 敬上
